promotion_gate: PROMOTED iff on >=2 datasets: full-evidence recovery >= dataset threshold AND 0/40 false graduations on the control battery (report exact CP95 upper). Else NOT_PROMOTED.
multiplicity: ladder x dataset x model grid = one declared family; recovery curves reported whole (no cell cherry-picking); maxT unavailable (no shared joint null across datasets) -> Holm within any tested sub-family
scale_unreachable_rule: datasets with n_full < LA scale are labelled SCALE_UNREACHABLE and never extrapolated (anti-clamping rule, from the E200 audit)
exploratory_flag_mechanics: STATUS.json exploratory:true for P1; F1 requires the CSA sweep at-scale cells landed + unchanged prereg
